patch.value: brief next: delegate ranking to SDK next() so it agrees with pm next
pm brief next top-ranked item matches pm next top-ranked item on the same workspace; ranking delegates to SDK next() action (canonical scorer), not pm-brief's local rankItem

value.author: claude-opus
value.text: Implements companion pm-cli-website-gyi1 (fleet audit MED finding). Fix: brief next handler delegates ranking to SDK next() action (canonical scorer used by pm next) instead of local rankItem/selectNextItems, so both 'next' commands agree on the top item. Note: SDK's item->ContextRelevanceCandidate signal builder (buildItemContextRelevanceCandidates) is CLI-internal, not public -> filing separate pm-cli issue.

value.author: claude-opus
value.text: VERIFIED in clean isolated workspace: pm next TOP=wg-easy-ty7r, ready=[pm-graph-qy8h, n5yh, 16be, ion2]; pm brief next=[ty7r, pm-graph-qy8h, n5yh, 16be, ion2] = [recommended,...ready] EXACT MATCH. Non-monotonic local scores (ty7r score 150 ranks above pm-graph-qy8h score 196) prove order comes from pm next, not local scorer. Impl: readNextOrderedIds() shells 'pm next --json'; nextOrder threaded through BriefOptions into rankCandidates as authoritative primary sort; local evidence scorer retained for --explain + tiebreak of unranked. Both 'brief' and 'brief next' converge. 47/47 unit tests pass (added 2 nextOrder tests).
